title: Standardise XHTML DOCTYPE and add VersionTag to all XHTML files
description: 9 of 10 XHTML files lack VersionTag comments. DOCTYPE varies: most use XHTML 1.0 Strict, but Shop-ListedItems-Entry.xhtml uses Transitional and XHTML-invoke-secrets.xhtml uses XHTML 1.1. Standardise all to XHTML 1.0 Strict with VersionTag.
resolution: COMPLETED: XHTML DOCTYPE standardization and VersionTag work done in CSS consolidation session
